interface.longDescription:
YouVersion Bible App
Instant access to Scripture, study tools, and spiritual growth resources, right in your conversation.
The YouVersion Bible App brings the world's most popular Bible platform directly into ChatGPT. Whether you're studying a passage, looking for encouragement, or exploring Scripture with friends, you get immediate access to thousands of Bible versions in hundreds of languages.
What you can do:

Read any Bible passage in your preferred translation (KJV, NIV, ESV, and 2,000+ more)
Compare translations side-by-side to deepen your understanding
Find reading plans tailored to topics like faith, anxiety, relationships, or spiritual growth
Listen to Scripture with audio Bibles in multiple languages
Save and organize verses, notes, and prayers as you study
Share insights with your faith community

Why people love it:
No more switching between apps or tabs to look up a verse. Get Scripture instantly in context—whether you're journaling, discussing theology, seeking comfort, or preparing a lesson. With 1.05 Billion downloads worldwide, YouVersion makes engaging with the Bible simple, accessible, and part of your daily rhythm.
Perfect for personal devotions, group Bible studies, sermon prep, or anyone curious about exploring Scripture in a conversational way.
